line_item_fields.name: Job Name (or "Lamex PO" on some receipts)

validation_rules: If totals exist: total ~= subtotal + tax
If line items exist: total ~= sum(line_items.amount)
instructions:
Extraction Template Instructions:

1. Vendor: Extract the text at the very top of the first page, above or near the address block; look for law firm or company names.
2. Invoice/Receipt Number: Anchor on labels like "Inv#", "Invoice#", "Invoice No", "Invoice #", or "Bill No" and extract the adjacent number.
3. Transaction/Invoice Date: Anchor on dates next to "Date", "Invoice Date", or floating dates at the top near vendor/company or invoice details. Normalize to YYYY-MM-DD.
4. Invoice/Receipt Subtotal: Find "Subtotal", "Total Fee & Disbursements", or "Totals" near the bottom summary table. Extract the numeric value; ignore "Previous Balance" or "Payments". Remove currency formatting.
5. Tax: Find "Tax" labels near the summary area. If missing or not applicable, set as NaN.
6. Invoice/Receive Total: Anchor on "Total", "Balance Now Due", or the bottom-most grand total. Extract the numeric value; remove currency symbols/commas.
7. Service Location: Extract value next to "Service Location:" or similar; if label absent, set NaN.
8. Shipping Address: Extract value next to "Shipping Address:" or similar; if label absent, set NaN.
9. Billing Address: Anchor on "Billing Address:" or block directly underneath customer/company info (often below client name and before attention/file info); extract full multiline address.
10. Handwritten Note(s): Look for non-printed, non-typed annotations, often with visual clues (italic, script, or distinct from main text). If not present, set NaN.
11. Document Name: Use the file name of the PDF.
12. Page Number: Extract from "Page", "Pg.", or similar label or bottom margin. Remove extra text; parse as integer.
13. Bates Number: Extract from alphanumeric code with format like "CDII_000213" (often in header/footer or margin).
Line Items Extraction:

- Table starts at headers like "DATE", "DESCRIPTION", "HOURS", "AMOUNT", "LAWYER", or similar; rows are separated by whitespace.
- For each line, extract:
  - Item Description: Text between "DATE"/date (or empty cell) and "HOURS"/"AMOUNT".
  - Item Amount: Number under "AMOUNT" column for corresponding row; normalize decimals. Remove commas, currency symbols.
  - Job Name (or "Lamex PO"): If present, extract from column or field labeled "Job Name", "PO", or "Lamex PO"—otherwise set as NaN.
- Handle multi-line descriptions by merging adjacent lines between date/blank and amount columns until next date or line item starts.
Normalization:

- All dates: Parse to YYYY-MM-DD.
- Numbers/currency: Remove "$", ",", "USD" etc; parse as float.
- If value is missing or not found, return NaN.

Apply these rules for every similar invoice or receipt PDF to ensure consistent field and line item extraction.
output_columns: Job Name (or "Lamex PO" on some receipts)
